---
title: "Frances Sibyl Bland"
---

## Frances Sibyl Bland

**Dates:** (1806/7-1897)

**Maiden name:** (Collinson)

### Description

sister of Sophia Jane Harrison

### Biography

She married the Ven. Canon George Bland, Archdeacon of Northumberland.

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st [?1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
